name: Muddy Buddies
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the cereal into a large bowl and set aside.
2. In a 1-quart microwave-safe bowl, combine chocolate chips, peanut butter, and oleo (or butter).
3. Microwave on high for 1 to 1-1/2 minutes, stirring after 1 minute until smooth.
4. Stir in the vanilla extract.
5. Pour the chocolate mixture over the cereal, stirring until all pieces are evenly coated.
6. Transfer the cereal mixture into a large, resealable plastic bag.
7. Add powdered sugar to the bag and seal securely.
8. Shake well to ensure even coating.
9. Spread the mixture on waxed paper to cool.
10. Serve and store leftovers in an airtight container.
